name: Benjamin Netanyahu
quote: We are at war. Not an operation, not a round of fighting — war. The enemy will pay an unprecedented price.

name: Yoav Gallant
quote: We are fighting human animals and we will act accordingly. Gaza will not return to what it was before October 7.

name: Lt. Gen. Herzi Halevi
quote: The IDF failed in its most basic mission — to protect the citizens of Israel. I take full responsibility.

name: Ronen Bar
quote: The Shin Bet failed in its mission. I bear responsibility for the intelligence failure that allowed October 7 to occur.

name: Benny Gantz
role: National Unity/Opposition Leader; War Cabinet Member (resigned Jun 2024)
quote: Netanyahu is holding up a deal. If the government does not present a clear post-war plan, we will leave the war cabinet.

name: Yahya Sinwar
role: Hamas Leader in Gaza; October 7 Mastermind (killed Oct 16, 2024)
quote: We are the ones who started this war and we know how to end it. Every martyr, every wounded person will open a gate to liberation.

name: Ismail Haniyeh
quote: The Al-Aqsa Flood has overturned the equations of the region. Palestine has returned to the center of the world's attention.

name: Mohammed Deif
role: Hamas Military Commander — announced Operation Al-Aqsa Flood
quote: Today, the era of this enemy's rampaging without accountability has ended. Launch thousands of rockets in the first hour.

name: Joe Biden
quote: The terrorist group Hamas unleashed pure, unadulterated evil. We stand with Israel. Israel has the right to defend itself.

name: Antony Blinken
quote: I come to Israel as an American — but also as a Jew. The United States will always be there for Israel.

name: Donald Trump
quote: Finish the job. Take out Hamas completely. The hostages must come home — all of them.

name: António Guterres
quote: The attacks by Hamas did not happen in a vacuum. But nothing can justify the deliberate targeting and killing of civilians. International humanitarian law must be respected by all parties.

name: Karim Khan
quote: The law is not a barrier to military action, it is a framework for that action. Arrest warrants have been issued for Netanyahu, Gallant, and Hamas commanders.

name: Pramila Patten
role: UN Special Representative on Sexual Violence in Conflict
quote: There are reasonable grounds to believe that sexual violence including rape and gang rape occurred in multiple locations on October 7 and continues against hostages.

name: Cyril Ramaphosa
role: South African President — filed ICJ genocide case
quote: South Africa has approached the ICJ because the scale of Israel's actions in Gaza constitutes genocide. We have an obligation under international law to act.

name: Itamar Ben Gvir
role: Israeli National Security Minister; Far-Right Coalition Partner
quote: There must be no ceasefire. We must demolish Hamas, and Jewish settlement in Gaza is a legitimate and moral response.

name: Bezalel Smotrich
role: Israeli Finance Minister; Far-Right Coalition Partner
quote: The State of Israel will not allow a Palestinian state. The correct solution is voluntary emigration of the Arab population from Gaza.

name: Yair Lapid
quote: Netanyahu had the intelligence, had the warnings, and chose not to act. The hostages are rotting in tunnels while he plays politics.

name: Emmanuel Macron
quote: France stands with Israel in the face of terrorism. But civilians in Gaza must be protected. The images coming from Gaza are unbearable.

name: Yocheved Lifshitz
role: Israeli Hostage — Released Nov 2023 (age 85, Kibbutz Nir Oz)
quote: They took very good care of us. They brought us medicines, but what they did before taking us was very difficult.
